response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified scenes: skit (00:00-02:11) and performance (02:12-04:56). 2. Identified 'Prism Melody' by 5u5h1 from on-screen text. 3. Used search tool to find full lyrics for 'Prism Melody'. 4. Organized the data into the requested JSON schema.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for the 'hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025' concert. The video begins with a humorous skit featuring several Hololive VTubers, followed by a live performance of the song 'Prism Melody' by the Hololive IDOL PROJECT.

scenes.description: A montage of various Hololive VTubers in a skit, promoting Coca-Cola as part of the Countdown Live event. No vocal music is performed.
The Hololive IDOL PROJECT performs their song 'Prism Melody' on a concert stage. The performance features dance choreography and concert visuals. 'Music: 5u5h1' appears on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Yes, always! We sing so that our miracle
Won't be interrupted
Higher! With a louder voice
Can you hear it? The signal that something is beginning
Gathering together, if you notice it, we played a chord
It's not enough just to dream, right?
There's a world waiting for you
Come on, just jump onto this joyful premonition
Because I can't stop this excitement
Let's run!
I'll take you! To the center of the light, beyond the dream
The courage to fly is your wish
This miracle that everyone connected
We sing so that it won't be interrupted
Higher! With a louder voice
Confused by answers and logic
Even if I wandered, there was a place I could return to
Our journey on a road not on the map
Only hope is the guide
Even if the color of the dream changes
A melody that never changes
For you, for us
Let's sing!
Yes, surely! Our miracle won't end
Let's turn even tears into a trigger
Together with the friends who believe in me
Let's jump out anywhere
Further! Over the sky
To the future us, to you I haven't seen yet
There are so many things I want to convey
The present we welcomed isn't just something taken for granted
Spread your wings, now
Let's fly!
Take my hand!!
I'll take you! To the center of the light, beyond the dream
The courage to fly is your wish
This miracle that everyone connected
We sing so that it won't be interrupted
Higher! With a louder voice
Coloring our future
Resound everywhere! Prism Melody
